## Checklist

- [ ] I have personally used or thoroughly evaluated this resource
- [ ] The project is actively maintained (activity within last 12 months)
- [ ] Open-source projects have at least 20 GitHub stars
- [ ] The description is factual and not promotional
- [ ] I checked that this resource is not already on the list
